source_jobs.title: Senior Cloud / Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR CLOUD / SECURITY ENGINEER


CYBRET AI
Remote
Norway and Europe preferred
Full-time
Early hire with equity



ABOUT CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building Autonomous Security Infrastructure for modern organizations operating in complex, distributed, cloud-native environments.

Our ambition is to move cybersecurity away from reactive, human-dependent workflows and toward continuous, intelligent, autonomous security. We design systems that combine human judgment where it matters with fully autonomous decision-making where speed, scale, and precision are required.

We make a strict distinction between automation and autonomy.
CYBRET AI does not rely on static rules or predefined playbooks. We build systems that understand context, reason over attack surfaces and exposure, assess real-world consequences, and take risk-based decisions. Humans are involved only when escalation is necessary.

Our primary focus is Exposure and Vulnerability Management as a decision system, not a reporting layer.

Instead of listing CVEs or producing noisy scan results, our platform understands real attack surfaces, realistic attack paths, business criticality, identity relationships, trust boundaries, and how modern attackers chain exposures in practice.

We are building toward Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud Marketplace launches, with cloud-agnostic design as a core principle.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a senior, hands-on cloud and security engineering role with real ownership and influence.

You will help design, secure, and reason about cloud-native environments at scale. Your work will directly shape how CYBRET AI models exposure, cloud risk, identity relationships, and attack paths across modern infrastructure.

You will operate at the intersection of cloud architecture, security engineering, identity, networking, and platform design, influencing both product logic and real-world security outcomes.


RESPONSIBILITIES


CLOUD SECURITY ARCHITECTURE

Design and evaluate secure architectures across Azure, AWS, and GCP
Define security-first patterns for cloud-native and hybrid environments
Assess misconfigurations, exposure, and trust boundaries across cloud services


IDENTITY AND ACCESS SECURITY

Work deeply with identity systems, IAM, permissions, service principals, and role design
Model identity-driven attack paths and privilege escalation scenarios
Help define secure identity and access patterns across cloud environments


EXPOSURE AND ATTACK SURFACE ENGINEERING

Model and analyze attack surfaces across cloud, identity, network, and application layers
Identify real-world attack paths rather than theoretical vulnerabilities
Contribute to how CYBRET AI reasons about exploitability and exposure


NETWORK AND ZERO TRUST SECURITY

Design and assess network architectures including private networking, segmentation, and zero-trust principles
Evaluate exposure through public services, APIs, ingress points, and infrastructure


SECURITY LOGIC AND RISK REASONING

Contribute to detection logic, correlation, and risk reasoning across multiple security signals
Help distinguish noise from real risk to support autonomous decision-making


RESEARCH AND THREAT MODELING

Track cloud-focused attacker techniques and emerging exploitation patterns
Perform threat modeling to improve coverage, logic, and decision quality



HOW WE WORK

CYBRET AI operates fully remote.
The team is currently based in Norway, but we hire internationally.

We recruit based on merit, excellence, and intelligence.
We value deep focus, curiosity, and strong ownership.

You are expected to work independently and make sound decisions in both low-effort, high-impact situations and high-effort, high-impact situations.

A strong shipping mindset is essential. Security work must lead to real product improvements, not just analysis.

Interest in cloud security research and state-of-the-art techniques is strongly preferred.
Writing technical blogs or research content is optional but highly valued.

Thi

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR BACKEND ENGINEER

CYBRET AI
Remote
Norway and Europe preferred
Full-time
Early hire with equity



ABOUT CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building Autonomous Security Infrastructure for modern organizations operating in complex, distributed, cloud-native environments.

Our ambition is to move cybersecurity away from reactive, human-dependent workflows and toward continuous, intelligent, autonomous security. We design systems that combine human judgment where it matters with fully autonomous decision-making where speed, scale, and precision are required.

We make a strict distinction between automation and autonomy. CYBRET AI does not rely on static rules or predefined playbooks. We build systems that understand context, reason over attack surfaces and exposure, assess real-world consequences, and take risk-based decisions.

Our primary focus is Exposure and Vulnerability Management as a decision system, not a reporting layer.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a senior backend engineering role with real ownership over core systems.

As a Senior Backend Engineer at CYBRET AI, you will design and build the services, data pipelines, and APIs that power autonomous security reasoning. Your work will directly affect system reliability, performance, and the correctness of security decisions.

You will work closely with AI engineers, security engineers, and product to turn complex security and AI logic into robust, production-grade backend systems.


RESPONSIBILITIES


BACKEND SYSTEMS & APIS

Design, build, and maintain core backend services and APIs
Implement scalable, secure, and well-structured backend architectures
Own services end-to-end from design and implementation to production and iteration


DATA & DISTRIBUTED SYSTEMS

Build and operate data pipelines for security signals, exposure data, and reasoning outputs
Work with distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and asynchronous processing
Ensure correctness, consistency, and performance at scale


RELIABILITY & SECURITY

Design for fault tolerance, observability, and operational excellence
Implement logging, metrics, tracing, and monitoring
Ensure backend systems follow strong security and data-protection practices


COLLABORATION & TECHNICAL LEADERSHIP

Collaborate closely with AI, security, and product teams
Translate product and reasoning requirements into clean backend implementations
Contribute to architectural decisions and long-term technical strategy
Mentor engineers and raise backend engineering standards



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong experience as a senior backend engineer in production environments
Excellent software engineering fundamentals and system design skills
Experience building distributed systems and high-throughput APIs
Strong ownership mindset and ability to operate independently

Experience with cloud platforms, security-critical systems, or data-intensive products is a strong plus, but not required.



HOW WE WORK

CYBRET AI operates fully remote.
The team is currently based in Norway, but we hire internationally.

We value ownership, clarity, and execution.
Engineers are expected to think in systems, not tickets.

A strong shipping mindset is essential. Backend work at CYBRET AI must lead to real, reliable product capabilities.

This is an early-stage startup. The pace is high, structure evolves continuously, and impact is real.



CULTURE AND BENEFITS

Monthly team gatherings such as weekend trips, cabin stays, and social events
Dedicated budget for learning, courses, and professional development

Small, highly skilled, talent-dense team
Ambition to scale without sacrificing quality or depth

English is the primary working language
Norwegian company with potential future transition to a US INC structure

Fully remote role with home office agreement
Laptop of your choice up to 20,000 NOK
Optional home office equipment
Mobile subscription and home internet fully reimbursed

Strict confidentiality and correct handling of sensitive information is manda

We make a strict distinction between automation and autonomy. CYBRET AI does not rely on static rules or predefined playbooks. We build systems that understand context, reason over attack surfaces and exposure, assess real-world consequences, and take risk-based decisions.

CULTURE AND BENEFITS

source_jobs.title: Head of Design
source_jobs.description:
CYBRET AI is building the next generation of autonomous cybersecurity systems. We are an AI-native security company designing platforms that reason, prioritize, and act at machine speed. Our mission is to redefine how security teams operate by replacing fragmented tools with intelligent, cohesive systems.


We are now looking for a Head of Design to own and shape the design direction of CYBRET AI across product, brand, and user experience.

This is a founding-level role with real ownership, influence, and long-term impact.



THE ROLE

As Head of Design, you will define and execute the design vision of CYBRET AI. You will work closely with the CEO, product, engineering, and research to build a product that is not only powerful, but intuitive, elegant, and trusted.

You will operate both strategically and hands-on, setting direction while actively designing core experiences.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Product & UX
Own the end-to-end design of CYBRET’s platform, from core workflows and dashboards to advanced security and AI-driven interfaces
Design complex, data-dense security experiences that remain clear, calm, and actionable
Translate abstract AI and security concepts into understandable and usable product flows
Continuously improve usability, clarity, and decision-making support for security teams

Design Systems & Quality
Build and maintain a scalable design system that supports speed, consistency, and quality
Set high standards for interaction design, visual design, and accessibility
Ensure design quality across all surfaces, including web, dashboards, internal tools, and future products

Brand & Identity
Own and evolve CYBRET AI’s visual identity in close collaboration with leadership
Ensure strong alignment between brand, product, and communication
Help position CYBRET as a serious, trusted, and modern security company

Leadership & Collaboration
Act as the design authority across the company
Collaborate deeply with engineers, product, and researchers
Mentor future designers as the team grows



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong experience as a senior product designer or design lead, preferably in B2B, SaaS, or technical products
Proven ability to design complex systems and workflows, not just marketing surfaces
Strong product thinking and an understanding of how design drives clarity, trust, and adoption
High attention to detail and strong visual judgment
Ability to work independently and take ownership in an early-stage company
Comfortable working closely with engineering and understanding technical constraints
Experience with security, developer tools, data platforms, or AI products is a strong plus



WHAT WE OFFER

A key leadership role in a highly ambitious AI security company
Real ownership over product and brand direction
Competitive salary and meaningful equity
A small, elite team with a strong engineering and research culture
Freedom to shape something from the ground up, without legacy constraints
Remote-friendly setup with flexibility



WHY CYBRET AI

We are not building another security dashboard. We are building an intelligent security system that reasons, prioritizes, and acts.

Design is central to this mission. If you care deeply about clarity, quality, and building products that professionals rely on in critical situations, this role is for you.

source_jobs.title: Founding Account Excecutive (USA)
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE (USA)

CYBRET AI
United States
Remote (US-based)
Full-time
Founding role with meaningful equity



ABOUT CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building Autonomous Security Infrastructure for modern organizations operating in complex, cloud-native environments.

We are moving cybersecurity away from reactive, human-dependent workflows and toward continuous, intelligent, autonomous security. Our systems reason about exposure, exploitability, and real-world risk instead of producing dashboards, alerts, or static reports.

CYBRET AI does not rely on predefined playbooks or rules. We build systems that understand context, assess consequences, and make risk-based decisions. Humans are involved only when escalation is required.

Our initial focus is Exposure and Vulnerability Management as a decision system, not a scanning or reporting tool.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a founding commercial role for the United States market.

As Founding Account Executive, you will own early revenue in the US and help design how CYBRET AI sells, positions, and scales. You will work directly with the founder and engineering leadership to turn early product traction into a repeatable go-to-market motion.

This role is far beyond traditional quota carrying. You will sell, but you will also build the foundation for future sales channels, messaging, pricing, and team structure.


RESPONSIBILITIES


REVENUE & CUSTOMERS

Own the full sales cycle from first conversation to close
Sell a complex, technical cybersecurity product to security, engineering, and executive buyers
Build deep relationships with early customers and design partners
Act as the voice of the customer internally and influence product direction


GO-TO-MARKET & SALES FOUNDATIONS

Define and document CYBRET AI’s US sales motion, qualification framework, and messaging
Help shape pricing, packaging, and commercial structure
Develop early outbound, inbound, and founder-led sales playbooks
Position CYBRET AI clearly against incumbents and emerging competitors


MARKET DEVELOPMENT

Establish CYBRET AI’s presence and credibility in the US market
Identify high-leverage customer segments across startups, scaleups, and enterprises
Support partnerships, pilots, and lighthouse customer deals


TEAM BUILDING

Hire and mentor future Account Executives and sales roles
Help define compensation models, incentives, and performance metrics
Set the standard for sales culture, rigor, and professionalism



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Proven experience in B2B SaaS sales, ideally in cybersecurity, cloud, or developer-focused products
Strong track record selling complex, technical products in the US market
Comfortable working without existing structure, playbooks, or brand recognition
Ability to work closely with technical founders and security engineers
Strong ownership mindset and ambition to grow into a Head of Sales or VP Sales role

Experience in cybersecurity is a strong bonus, but not a requirement if you can learn fast and sell with credibility.



HOW WE WORK

CYBRET AI is remote-first with a strong execution culture.

We value ownership, clarity, and outcomes over process for its own sake.
Early sales hires are expected to build, test, and iterate quickly.

This is an early-stage company. The pace is high, feedback is direct, and impact is immediate.



COMPENSATION & EQUITY

Competitive base salary with performance-based commission
Meaningful founding-level equity
Long-term upside aligned with company growth

Early hires are treated as owners, not employees.



WHY JOIN CYBRET AI

You should join CYBRET AI if you want to:
• Build the US revenue engine from zero
• Sell a genuinely differentiated cybersecurity product
• Work directly with technical founders and influence product direction
• Grow into a true commercial leader, not just carry a quota
• Be an early owner in a company with global ambition

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER

CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building an AI-native cybersecurity platform designed to reason, prioritize, and act autonomously. We are redefining security operations by replacing fragmented tooling with intelligent systems built for scale, reliability, and speed.

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to help design and build the core platform powering CYBRET AI.

This is a high-impact role with deep ownership over architecture, systems, and product quality.



THE ROLE

As a Senior Software Engineer, you will work across backend systems, APIs, data pipelines, and infrastructure to build reliable, secure, and scalable software. You will collaborate closely with AI engineers, security experts, and product to turn complex ideas into production-ready systems.


RESPONSIBILITIES

Platform & Backend
Design, build, and maintain core backend services and APIs
Develop scalable, secure, and well-architected systems
Work with distributed systems and event-driven architectures
Ensure high performance, reliability, and fault tolerance

Engineering Excellence
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
Own systems end-to-end from design to production
Improve observability, monitoring, and operational maturity
Contribute to architectural decisions and technical direction

Collaboration & Growth
Work closely with AI, security, and product teams
Translate product and security requirements into robust technical solutions
Mentor engineers and raise the overall engineering bar
Help shape engineering standards and best practices



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong experience as a senior software engineer in production environments
Solid backend engineering background with modern languages and frameworks
Experience building distributed systems, APIs, and data-driven services
Strong understanding of system design, scalability, and reliability
Ability to operate independently and take ownership

Experience with cybersecurity, cloud platforms, or AI-driven products is a strong plus, but not required.



WHAT WE OFFER

Senior, high-ownership role in an ambitious AI security company
Competitive salary and meaningful equity
Direct influence on product and technical strategy
A small, elite team with high standards
Freedom to build things properly, without legacy constraints
Remote-friendly setup



WHY CYBRET AI

We are not building yet another security tool. We are building intelligent systems that security teams rely on when it matters most.

If you care about quality, ownership, and building real products that ship, this role is for you.

source_jobs.title: Founding Account Excecutive
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE


CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building an AI-native cybersecurity platform designed to reason, prioritize, and act autonomously. We are replacing fragmented security tooling with intelligent systems built for modern organizations.

We are looking for a Founding Account Executive who will do far more than close deals. This role will build the foundation of CYBRET AI’s entire sales motion.

This is a rare opportunity to define how a category-defining security company sells, scales, and wins its first major customers.



THE ROLE

As Founding Account Executive, you will own early revenue end-to-end and help design CYBRET AI’s go-to-market engine from scratch. You will work directly with the founder, product, and engineering to turn early traction into a repeatable, scalable sales motion.

You will sell, but you will also build.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Revenue & Customers
Own the full sales cycle from first conversation to close
Work closely with technical founders to sell a complex AI and cybersecurity product
Develop deep relationships with early customers and design partners
Act as the voice of the customer internally and feed insights back into product and roadmap

Sales Foundation
Define and document CYBRET AI’s sales process, messaging, and qualification framework
Help shape pricing, packaging, and contract structures
Build the first playbooks for outbound, inbound, and partner-led sales
Lay the groundwork for future sales channels and partnerships

Go-to-Market Strategy
Collaborate on ICP definition, buyer personas, and market segmentation
Experiment with different sales motions across startups, scaleups, and enterprises
Help position CYBRET AI clearly against incumbents and emerging competitors

Team Building
Hire, mentor, and scale the future sales team as the company grows
Help define roles, compensation models, and performance metrics
Set the standard for sales culture, professionalism, and execution



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Proven experience in B2B SaaS sales, ideally in cybersecurity, cloud, or developer-focused products
Comfortable selling complex, technical solutions to technical and executive buyers
Strong ownership mindset and ability to operate without existing structure
Experience building or scaling early-stage sales motions is a major plus
Strong communication skills and credibility with security, engineering, and leadership teams
Ambition to grow into a Head of Sales or commercial leadership role

Cybersecurity experience is a strong bonus, but not a hard requirement if you learn fast and think clearly.



WHAT WE OFFER

Founding-level role with real ownership and influence
Competitive base salary plus meaningful equity
Direct impact on company strategy, revenue, and growth
Close collaboration with a deeply technical founding team
The opportunity to build something from zero and scale it globally



WHY CYBRET AI

We are not selling shelfware or another noisy security tool. We are building intelligent security systems for the next decade.

If you want to be early, build real foundations, and grow into a true commercial leader rather than just carry a quota, this role is for you.

source_jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR AI ENGINEER

CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building an AI-native cybersecurity platform designed to reason, prioritize, and act autonomously. We are redefining how security teams operate by replacing fragmented tools with intelligent systems that work at machine speed.

We are looking for a Senior AI Engineer to help design, build, and scale the intelligence layer of CYBRET AI.

This is a core technical role with deep influence over architecture, models, and how AI is applied in real-world security environments.



THE ROLE

As a Senior AI Engineer, you will work on the heart of CYBRET AI’s platform. You will design and implement AI systems that analyze security data, reason over complex environments, and generate decisions that matter.

You will work closely with security engineers, platform engineers, and product to turn advanced AI concepts into production-grade systems.



RESPONSIBILITIES

AI Systems & Architecture
Design and implement AI pipelines for detection, reasoning, prioritization, and decision support
Build agent-based and workflow-driven AI systems operating over security data
Work with structured and unstructured data across logs, alerts, telemetry, and external intelligence
Design evaluation, feedback, and continuous improvement loops

Model Development & Integration
Develop and integrate LLM-based systems, retrieval pipelines, and hybrid ML approaches
Design prompt strategies, tool-calling systems, and multi-step reasoning flows
Optimize for latency, cost, reliability, and correctness in production

Production & Reliability
Build AI systems that are observable, debuggable, and safe in real environments
Collaborate on infrastructure, deployment, and scaling of AI services
Implement monitoring, evaluation metrics, and guardrails

Collaboration & Influence
Work closely with security domain experts to encode real-world reasoning into AI systems
Contribute to product direction and technical strategy
Help set engineering standards and mentor other engineers as the team grows


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Strong experience building production AI or ML systems
Hands-on experience with LLMs, retrieval-augmented generation, or agent-based systems
Solid software engineering background with Python and modern backend systems
Experience working with distributed systems, APIs, and data pipelines
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to reason about complex systems

Experience in cybersecurity, cloud security, or large-scale data platforms is a strong bonus, but not required.



WHAT WE OFFER

Senior, high-impact role in an ambitious AI security company
Real ownership over core intelligence systems
Competitive salary and meaningful equity
A small, elite team with strong technical standards
Freedom to build systems the right way, without legacy constraints
Remote-friendly setup



WHY CYBRET AI

We are not experimenting with AI. We are building security systems where AI is the product.

If you want to work on applied AI that operates in high-stakes environments and actually ships to production, this role is for you.

source_jobs.title: Head of Engineering
source_jobs.description:
HEAD OF ENGINEERING

CYBRET AI
Remote
Norway and Europe preferred
Full-time

ABOUT CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building Autonomous Security Infrastructure for modern organizations operating in complex, distributed, cloud-native environments.

Our ambition is to move cybersecurity away from reactive, human-dependent workflows and toward continuous, intelligent, autonomous security. We design systems that combine human judgment where it matters with fully autonomous decision-making where speed, scale, and precision are required.

CYBRET AI does not rely on static rules or predefined playbooks. We build systems that understand context, reason over attack surfaces and exposure, assess real-world consequences, and take risk-based decisions.

This is an early-stage startup. The pace is high, structure evolves continuously, and impact is real.

A strong shipping mindset is essential. Engineering leadership at CYBRET AI means building systems that work in the real world, not just designing them.


CULTURE AND BENEFITS

Monthly team gatherings such as weekend trips, cabin stays, and social events

source_jobs.title: Senior Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR SECURITY ENGINEER


CYBRET AI
Remote
Norway and Europe preferred
Full-time
Early hire with equity



ABOUT CYBRET AI

CYBRET AI is building Autonomous Security Infrastructure for modern organizations operating in complex, distributed, cloud-native environments.

Our ambition is to move cybersecurity away from reactive, human-dependent workflows and toward continuous, intelligent, autonomous security. We design systems that combine human judgment where it matters with fully autonomous decision-making where speed, scale, and precision are required.

We make a strict distinction between automation and autonomy.

CYBRET AI does not rely on static rules or predefined playbooks. Our systems understand context, reason over attack surfaces and exposure, assess real-world consequences, and take risk-based decisions. Humans are involved only when escalation is necessary.

Our primary focus is Exposure and Vulnerability Management as a decision system, not a reporting layer.

Instead of listing CVEs or producing noisy scan results, our platform understands real attack surfaces, realistic attack paths, business criticality, identity relationships, trust boundaries, and how modern attackers chain exposures in practice.

CYBRET AI answers questions such as:
• What can actually be exploited right now
• What creates real risk for the organization
• What actions reduce risk most effectively

We are building toward Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud Marketplace launches, with cloud-agnostic design as a core principle.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a senior security role with deep technical responsibility and real ownership.

You will help define how exposure, risk, and exploitability are modeled, analyzed, and acted upon inside autonomous security systems. Your work directly shapes how CYBRET AI reasons about security decisions.

You will work across cloud security, identity, network security, detection engineering, and security architecture, closely influencing both product logic and technical direction.



RESPONSIBILITIES


EXPOSURE AND ATTACK SURFACE ANALYSIS

Design and improve how CYBRET AI models attack surfaces across cloud, identity, network, and application layers
Identify real-world attack paths and exploit chains rather than theoretical vulnerabilities


VULNERABILITY AND RISK ENGINEERING

Develop risk scoring and prioritization beyond CVSS
Incorporate exploitability, exposure, identity context, and business impact into decision-making


CLOUD AND IDENTITY SECURITY

Design and evaluate security controls across Azure, AWS, and GCP
Work deeply with identity systems, permissions, service principals, and trust boundaries
Define secure patterns for cloud-native and hybrid environments


DETECTION AND SECURITY LOGIC

Contribute to detection logic, correlation, and multi-signal reasoning
Distinguish noise from real risk to support autonomous decision-making


NETWORK AND ZERO TRUST ARCHITECTURE

Design and assess secure network architectures including private networking, segmentation, and zero-trust principles
Evaluate exposure through public services, APIs, and infrastructure


SECURITY RESEARCH AND THREAT MODELING

Track attacker techniques, emerging threats, and exploitation patterns
Perform threat modeling and security analysis to improve product logic and coverage



HOW WE WORK

CYBRET AI operates fully remote.
The team is currently based in Norway, but we hire internationally.

We recruit based on merit, excellence, and intelligence.
We value deep focus, curiosity, and strong ownership.

You are expected to work independently and make sound decisions in both low-effort, high-impact situations and high-effort, high-impact situations.

A strong shipping mindset is essential. Security work at CYBRET AI must lead to real product improvements, not just analysis.

Interest in security research and state-of-the-art techniques is strongly preferred.
Writing technical blogs or research content is optional but highly valued.

This is an early-s

source_jobs.title: Senior Researcher
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR RESEARCHER


COMPANY DESCRIPTION

CYBRET AI is a cutting-edge research lab dedicated to pioneering AI-driven security solutions. With a focus on both autonomous security systems involving human oversight and independent operations, CYBRET AI works to address critical challenges in cybersecurity. Based on innovation and advanced research, the organization aims to revolutionize the integration of artificial intelligence in safeguarding global digital ecosystems. The lab emphasizes collaboration and robust technology development to contribute to a safer digital future.




ROLE DESCRIPTION

This is a full-time, on-site position for a Founding Researcher based in Stockholm. The Founding Researcher will play a critical role in conceptualizing, leading, and executing advanced research initiatives in AI-driven security. Responsibilities include formulating novel research questions, designing experiments, developing and validating AI algorithms for security applications, collaborating across disciplines, and advancing the state-of-the-art in autonomous security systems. The Founding Researcher will also contribute to the technical vision, publish in top conferences/journals, and help shape the research culture of CYBRET AI.




QUALIFICATIONS

 - Proven research background in AI, machine learning, or related fields, with strong publication record or demonstrable research impact

 - Proficiency in research-level programming with languages such as Python, C++, or Java

 - Familiarity with AI and machine learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch)

 - Deep understanding of cybersecurity concepts, including threat modeling, detection, and prevention methodologies

 - Experience in designing or implementing security systems and algorithms

 - Knowledge of cloud computing and scalable distributed architectures is a plus

 - Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking skills

 - Ability to collaborate in a dynamic, innovative startup environment

 - PhD or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Cybersecurity, or related field; advanced degree preferred

 - Experience mentoring or leading research teams is a significant advantage




BONUS

 - STEM Olympiad credentials or notable research competitions

 - Demonstrated top achievements in relevant domains




COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary with equity participation

 - High-performance laptop provided

 - Covered mobile phone and wifi expenses

 - Fully remote work environment

 - Annual learning and development stipend of 500 USD

notes: CYBRET AI is a cutting-edge research lab pioneering AI-driven security solutions.
